text.message: I like a nice banana salad smoothie
What is your favourite current band
Mcr, found a cd at yard sale for 50 cents and have been replaying hard
Sharpest lives is my current favorite
What do you think of Billy Talent?
Honest feedback, I like but don't love
Guitar solos lack the energy I'm looking for, solid chorus and intros
Perhaps you'll like Samsa. I rec Cuttlefish
We saw her live last year and got to mee her. It was so surreal
Mustve been so dope meeting her
It was so cool, I was shaking
did you hear her newest album?
she's just super nice and so down to earth
and actually cares about the world
I didn't, will listen after game
What other music do you like?
Edm, namely porter Robinson and Illenium
Rl grime if I'm feeling spicy
Ooh that's cool! I love Grimes
Have you heard of infectted mushroom?
No, it sounds like trance haha
Check out Crywolf, totally different genre but I love his style
Def my favorite from your recs
You need to listen to Widow and Cataclysm
